_loomcycle.description: Slack — channel + DM messaging, history reads. Schedule-compatible delivery target.
_loomcycle.agent_prompt_hint: Use this to post messages to Slack channels or DMs. Cite the channel-id in the call args (looks like C01234ABCD). For scheduled-run delivery hooks, set the on_complete.mcp.call.server to 'slack' and tool to 'send_message'.
